subcodes.first_line: O divine physician! Thy message, through the martyred brother, arrived and became the cause of joy and gladness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طبیب روحانی پیام تو بواسطه برادر شهید رسید سبب فرح و خوشی گردید فورا
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement
